entity.summary: Decentralized exchange and on-chain liquidity protocol built around the Proactive Market Maker model. DODO V1 emerged in August 2020, the protocol expanded through later versions, and the wider service remained active after a March 2021 security incident affecting several V2 Crowdpool pools.
entity.notes: Entity-level umbrella record for DODO protocol versions and supported-chain deployments. The launch marker is month-level because official documentation identifies August 2020 without asserting a stronger exact day.

events.title: DODO V1 emerged as the protocol's first DEX product
events.description: DODO V1 entered operation in August 2020 as the first version of the protocol, introducing its Proactive Market Maker approach to decentralized liquidity and trading.
events.notes: Month-level launch marker; no exact day is asserted.

events.title: Several DODO V2 Crowdpool pools were affected by a security incident
events.description: Several DODO V2 Crowdpool pools were affected by a March 2021 security incident. Public incident analyses and partner updates stated that other V1 and non-Crowdpool V2 pools were not affected, and recovery work followed.
events.notes: The incident affected a subset of V2 Crowdpool pools and did not terminate the wider DODO protocol.

evidence.title: DODO V1: The First Step of DODO
evidence.notes: Official documentation states that DODO V1 emerged in August 2020.

evidence.title: DODO Token
evidence.notes: Official token-economy documentation records the August 2020 initial-liquidity release period.

evidence.title: What is DODO?
evidence.notes: Current official documentation describing DODO as an active decentralized exchange and liquidity provider.

evidence.title: An Analysis of the Attack on DODO
evidence.notes: Security-firm analysis of the March 2021 DODO V2 Crowdpool incident.

evidence.title: Project Update: March 2021
evidence.notes: Affected-project update reproducing DODO's incident notice, affected-pool scope and subsequent recovery context.
